name: Victor Wooten
abstract: Victor Lemonte Wooten (born September 11, 1964) is an American bassist, songwriter, and record producer. He has been the bassist for Béla Fleck and the Flecktones since the group's formation in 1988 and a member of the bass supergroup SMV (2008–2009) with two other bassists, Stanley Clarke and Marcus Miller.

concerts.label: JVC Jazz Festival: Bela Fleck and The Flecktones/ Del McCoury Band
concerts.venue: Isaac Stern Auditorium / Ronald O. Perelman Stage

about_quotes.speaker: Chuck Lamb
about_quotes.evidence: Victor Wooten came over. So we just sat there and just improvised together for about an hour.
about_quotes.doc_title: Chuck Lamb interviewed by Monk Rowe, Clinton, New York, February 7, 2023

about_quotes.speaker: Branford Marsalis
about_quotes.evidence: That’s what’s so amazing about a guy like Victor Wooten, cause he can play all of that... I love that about him.
about_quotes.doc_title: Branford Marsalis — Smithsonian Jazz Oral History

about_quotes.speaker: David Finck
about_quotes.evidence: Victor, he’s astounding technically. I don’t have any Victor Wooten records, for whatever reason.
about_quotes.doc_title: David Finck interviewed by Monk Rowe, Utica, New York, May 29, 2015
